steps.description: From Draco, 7th-century Athenian lawgiver known for harsh laws

Dracula → 龙之子 → 吸血鬼
draft → 拉出草稿 → 草拟

dragoman → 中东地区的翻译官导游

dragoon → 骑龙的兵 → 强迫别人
